title: [Martand, Hamir Hat.]
gloss: The November, 1911, issue of the Martand describes the story of Sardar Mir Muhammad's flight from Ala-ud-din Khilji's court and his taking refuge with Hamir of Ran Thambur. The Emperor demanded Mir Muhammad's surrender but met with a refusal. In a series of battles that followed Hamir was defeated and both Hamir and Mir Muhammad killed
copyright: Lala Gauri Shankar Lal, Akhtar Manager, "Sadhu" and "Saraswati bhandar," Lahore; No. 79 (a), dated the 9th April, 1912.
notes: Edited by Lala Sheo Brat Lal, Verman, M. A.
